headline: Is Teledyne Technologies Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Teledyne Technologies has surged past the S&P 500 Index over the past year, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s growth potential.

headline: Teledyne e2v Has Started Production of Its 16GB DDR4-X1 Flight Models for Space Applications
summary: GRENOBLE, France, March 17, 2026--Teledyne e2v is pleased to announce the start of full production of its 16GB DDR4-X1 Flight Model (FM), expanding its portfolio of high-density, radiation-tolerant memory solutions for space applications.

headline: Teledyne e2v's 16GB DDR4-X1 Flight Model Enters Production, Offering 2400 MT/s Data Rates And 35 Krad Radiation Tolerance For Space
